data.content: Planning complete for stale grooming outcome execution. Proposed implementation adds a stale-grooming outcome application layer that appends a provenance handoff capsule for every successful result, updates lastUpdated through canonical backend operations, applies reshape fields through backend.update, and routes drop to an abandoned-state backend/Knots operation. Risks called out: choosing the correct canonical abandoned transition instead of shipped-oriented close(), and avoiding partial success if capsule append or mutation fails.
